title: HOOK — beach arrival
prompt: Composition is anchored by @ep12-c1-hook. Animate the still gently — every figure stays in their EXACT physical spot throughout the entire 10s, only their faces and small upper-body gestures change. There are EXACTLY 3 people in the entire frame, no extras, no additional spawns. (BEAT 1 — 0-5s) Sara warmly looks out toward the surf, eyes bright with cheerful kid-show energy. Sara (cheerful warm voice): "BEACH DAY!" Eva softly shakes her float ring with both hands and giggles brightly. Eva (giggling sing-song): "Sandy toes! Salty knees!" (BEAT 2 — 5-10s) Mama tilts her head softly and warm-laughs. Mama (warm laugh): "Let's find a good spot for our blanket." All three keep both feet planted on the sand throughout — no leaping, no jumping, no walking. Calm cheerful kid-show family ambiance. Preserve each character's silhouette and proportions throughout — no morphing, no shifting of hair or wardrobe, no color drift.
